metadata.description: Ecosystem-performance fluency for AI harnesses. 1 skill, 4 commands (one per e18e pillar), runtime-verified against the live module-replacements manifest.

plugins.name: e18e
plugins.description: Skills and commands for JavaScript ecosystem-performance work. 4 user-invocable commands (/audit, /cleanup, /speedup, /levelup), each with focused sub-modes, plus the main e18e skill with references for cleanup, speedup, levelup, module replacements, native replacements, tooling, and contributing. Replacement recommendations are verified against the live es-tooling/module-replacements manifest at runtime.
